summary: Notification Configuration API and UI testing complete. All 11 backend tests passed. Fixed ESS API login issue (unique device_id constraint). Frontend NotificationConfigPage.jsx fixed (import error). UI loads correctly with triggers, templates, stats, and announcement functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed NotificationConfigPage.jsx - was importing 'api' as default export but api.js only has named exports. Changed to use axios directly.
Fixed TypeScript type annotation in JSX file (line 517) - removed ':any' type annotations
Fixed ESS API auth route - device_id unique constraint violation when same device logs in again. Added delete before insert.
Fixed ESS API auth route - expires_at was datetime object instead of ISO string
seed_data_creation: Notification triggers and templates auto-seeded on first API call
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification Config API fully tested. All endpoints working: GET /api/notification-config/triggers, GET /api/notification-config/templates, GET /api/notification-config/stats, PUT /api/notification-config/triggers/{id}, POST /api/notification-config/send-announcement. ESS API on port 8002 also working. FCM push notifications are MOCKED without Firebase credentials.

notification_config_api.get_stats: PASS - Returns stats with registered_devices, notifications_by_type, fcm_delivery_status
notification_config_api.update_trigger: PASS - Can toggle is_enabled, send_push, send_in_app, send_email
notification_config_api.send_announcement: PASS - Creates in-app notifications for all active users

ess_api.auth_login: PASS - Login with device registration works

main_crm_api.root: PASS - /api/ returns WiseDrive CRM V2 API

frontend_ui.triggers_tab: PASS - Shows 8 triggers with toggle switches
frontend_ui.templates_tab: PASS - Shows 8 templates with edit capability
frontend_ui.stats_cards: PASS - Shows registered devices, sent count, total notifications, announcements

mocked_apis.FCM_push_notifications: MOCKED - No actual push sent without FIREBASE_CREDENTIALS_PATH or FIREBASE_CREDENTIALS_JSON
